name: Peach Ice Cream Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Grease a 9 x 5 x 3 inch loaf pan with cooking spray and line with plastic wrap. In a bowl, mix the crumbs, toasted almonds, minced crystallized ginger, sugar, and melted butter. Spoon 1 cup of this mixture into the bottom of the pan.
2. Cut the frozen peach yogurt in half lengthwise through the container and peel off the wrapper. Cut each half crosswise into six pieces. Arrange them in one layer over the crumbs.
3. Pour the caramel sauce over the yogurt. Freeze for 1 hour.
4. On top, layer the remaining crumbs, yogurt, ice cream (cut into pieces), and more crumbs. Cover and freeze overnight.
To Serve: Uncover the cake. Invert it onto a platter and serve with fruits.
